mustPass: The scaffold must support B2B sales journeys rather than consumer checkout assumptions.
Home, sortiment, bli-kund and contact must work together to explain what is sold, to whom and how a business relationship starts.
Copy structure must make room for logistics, assortment breadth, supplier relationships and practical purchasing information.
Contact conversion must support inquiry-led sales, not only generic brand awareness.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a restaurant, portfolio site or appointment-led local service.
Do not assume consumer prices, add-to-cart flows or webshop behavior unless explicitly available.
Do not overuse generic trust language that says little about assortment, delivery or business customers.
Do not invent certifications, warehouse size, delivery times, brand partnerships or customer counts.
